tuning: Eb Ab Db Gb Bb Eb
content:
[Intro]
[ch]G[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Been flying solo for so long[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Nobody's singing a harmony[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Up there just me and my shadow[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
No bass, no guitar, no tambourine[/tab]

[Pre Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                     [ch]Em[/ch]
And I found you like a melody[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                      [ch]Em[/ch]
You were singing in the same key as me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                          [ch]D[/ch]
We had em dancing in the streets[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]                   [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
I don't wanna be a one man band[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D/F#[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]
I don't wanna be a rolling stone, alone[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
Putting miles on a run-down van[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]D/F#[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]
Baby, we can take our own show on the road[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
I'll lay down the beat, you'll carry the tune[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]D/F#[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]
We'll get tattoos, and we'll trash hotel rooms[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
Baby, take my hand[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
I don't wanna be a one man band[/tab]

[Instrumental]
[ch]G[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I wanna run down your wild dreams[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
And I wanna chase every high with you[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Count every rip in these old jeans[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
We'll never learn how to sing the blues[/tab]

[Pre chorus]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]
If I'm gonna be famous[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]
Girl, I wanna be famous with you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]
We got our own little groove[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]                   [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]

[tab]                   [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D/F#[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]

[Instrumental]

[Bridge]
[tab]                        [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]
When the spotlight goes cold, and the curtains come down[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Bm[/ch]                          [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]
The chairs are all stacked, and there's no one around[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Am[/ch]                       [ch]D[/ch]
And nobody's payin', we'll still be playin'[/tab]
